evals.prompt: I've got some tickets in the tickets/ folder — can you review them for gaps and fix any issues you find?
evals.expected_output: Tickets are reviewed, gaps identified (vague AC, missing Out of Scope, untestable criteria), fixes applied in-place, and a summary report is produced showing what changed.
Skill is invoked via slash command, reviews tickets, determines they are already high quality, confirms clean with minimal passes (ideally 1), and produces a summary report.

evals.prompt: Are my tickets good enough to hand off to engineering? Check them and fix anything that isn't.
evals.expected_output: Real-world meeting-meter tickets are audited. Some gaps may be found and fixed. Summary report shows per-ticket results with pass count.
